summary: Tested Safe Delete & Restore feature for Teachers and Students. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI elements (restore buttons, delete buttons) are present and correctly placed on both manage-teachers and students pages.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web TouchableOpacity events not triggerable via standard DOM click events in Playwright. Manual testing recommended to verify modal opens correctly.

action_items: Manual verification recommended: Click delete button on manage-teachers page to confirm safe-delete modal opens with backup info
Manual verification recommended: Click delete button on students page to confirm safe-delete modal opens with backup info

success_rate.frontend: UI Elements Present - Manual click testing needed for React Native Web

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test teachers/students during safe-delete/restore flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safe Delete & Restore feature for Teachers and Students is fully implemented. Backend endpoints verified: GET /api/teachers/{id}/backup-info, POST /api/teachers/{id}/safe-delete, POST /api/teachers/restore, GET /api/students/{id}/backup-info, POST /api/students/{id}/safe-delete, POST /api/students/restore. Frontend has 'استعادة' button on manage-teachers page and 'استعادة طالب من نسخة احتياطية' banner on students page. Delete buttons (red trash icons) present on all teacher/student rows.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/teachers/{teacher_id}/backup-info - Returns teacher info with courses, lectures, attendance counts ✅
POST /api/teachers/{teacher_id}/safe-delete - Returns backup JSON and deletes teacher ✅
POST /api/teachers/restore - Restores teacher from backup JSON ✅
GET /api/students/{student_id}/backup-info - Returns student info with courses, attendance counts ✅
POST /api/students/{student_id}/safe-delete - Returns backup JSON and deletes student ✅
POST /api/students/restore - Restores student from backup JSON ✅
frontend_elements: manage-teachers page: Delete buttons (trash icons) on each teacher card ✅
students page: 'استعادة طالب من نسخة احتياطية' restore banner visible ✅
students page: Delete buttons (trash icons) on each student row ✅
